runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 19.98, beating Sunset Dreaming. Last start finished 6th in a Free For All on April 8 over 352m at this track behind Auburn Queen beaten 6 lengths (19.98). Leading chance on best form.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when seventh and beaten 7 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Rates well on best and expect a better run this time.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.70) in a Free For All, finishing a 2.5 lengths fourth. Has two wins and three placings from seven starts from the draw. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

runners.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.3 lengths second at Capalaba but did record a slick 19.89 over the 366m trip. Prefer others this time.

runners.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 10 over 390m at this track in a Free For All. Can't recommend her in this.

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (19.63) over 366m at Capalaba. Drawn wide. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked at the first turn shortly after became unbalanced and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.3 lengths at this track over 352m (19.62) beating Kingsbrae Zeus in Grade 4 on April 8. Expected to measure up again.
